creator: conall@conall.net
text:
nagios-devel is marked as vulnerable 
   http://www.freshports.org/vuxml.php?vid=3ebd4cb5-657f-11de-883a-00e0815b8da8

Fix: 

Package maintainer needs to to update to nagios 3.1.2. 

   (I did try to update the Makefile and distinfo files myself to generate
   the necessary patches, but the supplementary patches didn't apply cleanly
   to nagios 3.1.2, so this is a non trivial fix)
How-To-Repeat: 	N/A
